title: poa alpina var. xerophila
intro: Poa alpina var. xerophila, also known as the alpine meadow grass, is a variety of the Poa alpina species of grass that is native to alpine regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Poa alpina var. xerophila include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory infections.
